inputs.label: Turbine Inlet Enthalpy (h₁)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy of steam at turbine inlet (superheated conditions)

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy of steam at turbine inlet (superheated conditions)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Türbin girişinde buharın özgül entalpisi (kızgın buhar koşulları)

inputs.label: Isentropic Turbine Exit Enthalpy (h₂ₛ)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy at turbine exit assuming isentropic expansion

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy at turbine exit assuming isentropic expansion
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzantropik genişleme varsayımıyla türbin çıkışındaki özgül entalpi

inputs.label: Condenser Outlet Enthalpy (h₃)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy of saturated liquid leaving the condenser

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy of saturated liquid leaving the condenser
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yoğuşturucudan çıkan doymuş sıvının özgül entalpisi

inputs.label: Isentropic Pump Exit Enthalpy (h₄ₛ)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy at pump exit assuming isentropic compression

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy at pump exit assuming isentropic compression
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzantropik sıkıştırma varsayımıyla pompa çıkışındaki özgül entalpi

inputs.label: Turbine Isentropic Efficiency (ηₜ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of actual turbine work to isentropic work (0–1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of actual turbine work to isentropic work (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek türbin işinin izantropik işe oranı (0–1)

inputs.label: Pump Isentropic Efficiency (ηₚ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of isentropic pump work to actual pump work (0–1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of isentropic pump work to actual pump work (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzantropik pompa işinin gerçek pompa işine oranı (0–1)

formulas.thermalEfficiency: ((turbineInletEnthalpy - turbineExitIsentropicEnthalpy) * turbineEfficiency - (pumpExitIsentropicEnthalpy - condenserOutletEnthalpy) / pumpEfficiency) / ((turbineInletEnthalpy - condenserOutletEnthalpy) - (pumpExitIsentropicEnthalpy - condenserOutletEnthalpy) / pumpEfficiency)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
